title: Current system snapshot
description: Non-authoritative cache that captures the current system's contradictions, judgments, and doc classifications. Pins the shape so agents stop reinventing contradiction_map and judgment_log entry formats per session.

contradiction_map.description: Known contradictions between runtime truth, contracts, and prose. Each entry is labeled, classified, and policy-tagged.

id.description: Stable identifier. Shape: CM-<DOMAIN>-<NN>, e.g. CM-OWN-01, CM-ARCH-03.

class.description: Contradiction class. Must match a class declared in ambiguity-policies.contract.json.

evidence.description: Freeform evidence records (paths, line refs, quoted snippets) supporting the contradiction claim.

policy_applied.description: References a policy id in ambiguity-policies.contract.json.

related_plan.description: Optional file path to an open stabilization plan. Consumed by check-setup for brownfield pass-with-warning.

judgment_log.description: Labeled judgments emitted by agents so later sessions can audit and supersede prior calls.

superseded_by.description: Optional id of a later judgment that overrides this one.

doc_classification.description: Optional projection of repo docs onto the doc-taxonomy layers.

layer.description: References a layer id in doc-taxonomy.contract.json#layers[].id.
